---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in the repair workflow or describe a repair task for the demo project
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the bug or repair target in one short paragraph.

## Repo Path

Which repository or workspace path is affected?

## Current Behavior

What happens today?

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction

Provide steps, a failing command, or an example task JSON.

## Test Command

If applicable, include the command that should pass after the fix.

## Additional Context

Add any logs, screenshots, or related notes here.
